positive: Minimalist stylized illustration of a cosmic crescent moon and constellation map, rendered with thick black lines and clean silhouettes against a gradient deep indigo and midnight blue background. The central composition features geometric celestial elements (stars, nebulae, and moon phases) forming a harmonious, symmetrical pattern. Use negative space effectively to guide the eye. Style should be modern abstract flat design, suitable for textile printing. Hyper-detailed line work, high contrast, crisp edges, vector illustration quality, highly decorative, single panel composition.
negative: blur, grainy, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, copyright, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, muted colors
